title: Economy Datapack
body:
Request your own data pack [here](https://forms.gle/rjLp2HzTL3mspPDq9) (You get credited for the idea, and a custom role on my discord)
# 
This economy datapack provides an easy and intuitive way to manage in-game currency in Minecraft. It allows players to engage in player-to-player trading by simply dropping money, creating a seamless and immersive economic experience.

### Purpose:
The primary function of this datapack is to offer a lightweight and straightforward economy system that integrates smoothly into any Minecraft server. Players can deposit money into their bank accounts right clicking any bank note, and withdraw it with the "/trigger withdraw" command. The system uses Minecraft's native scoreboard, making it compatible with other mods, plugins, or datapacks.

### Appeal:

- Simple Trading: Drop money directly to other players to trade, making transactions quick and hassle-free.
- User-Friendly Banking: Manage your funds effortlessly with easy-to-remember commands.
- Compatibility: Built to work seamlessly with other Minecraft content, thanks to its use of the native scoreboard system.
- Lightweight: Ideal for server owners looking for an uncomplicated economy system without the overhead of complex configurations.
### Work in Progress:
This datapack is actively being developed, with new features and improvements on the way. As it stands, money can only be generated or modified using the "/scoreboard player add [player] Bank [amount]" command.
